electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 54 Hz - 20 kHz ([X6i_50] preset); 69 Hz - 20 kHz ([X6i] preset), both -10 dB
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 123 dB with [X6i] preset; 117 dB with [X6i_50] preset (peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4). Reduced when driven by LA2Xi.
electroacoustic.components: Coaxial 2-way passive: LF 1 x 6.5 in, HF 1 x 1.5 in neodymium compression driver; bass-reflex (L-Vents) acoustical load

operating_modes: passive 2-way, single amplifier output per enclosure

connection.input_connector: 4-point terminal block with push-in connection and connector sealing plate (IN/LINK)
connection.adapters: SPCON 2-point speakON-to-bare-wire adaptor (2.5 mm2 gauge) replaces the sealing plate; not compatible with X6i-onCW, WALLx2, PANx2, GROUND, GROUND35, GROUND55

physical.dimensions_mm: 362 (H) x 187 (W) x 170 (D) (front face); 175 mm depth at the grill
physical.protection_rating: IP55 (vertical orientation with connector at top)
physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic birch and beech plywood; steel grill with anti-corrosion coating; finishes: Dark grey brown Pantone 426C, Pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order

deployment.monitor_angles: 0 degrees, 35 degrees, or 55 degrees when ground-stacked (cabinet shape provides three monitor angles)

usage: Compact 6.5 in coaxial point source for short-throw install: vocal reinforcement, fills, and surrounds in performing arts centers, houses of worship, corporate rooms, clubs, and hospitality spaces.
Passive design - each cabinet needs a single amplifier output. One LA7.16i drives up to 16, an LA12X up to 12, an LA4X or LA2Xi (single-ended) up to 8, and an LA2Xi in BTL mode up to 2.
Choose the [X6i_50] preset for standalone full-range coverage down to 54 Hz, or the higher-output [X6i] preset (123 dB, 69 Hz) for stronger vocals or when paired with a sub.
Extend the low end with SB6i or SB10i subwoofers using the matched crossover presets - closely coupled (200 Hz), coupled (100 Hz), or separated (60 Hz).
Use the [X6i_MO] low-latency monitor preset for stage-monitor duty; the cabinet shape gives 0/35/55 degree wedge angles, and LFC compensates coupling between paired monitors.
IP55 rated for indoor or outdoor use, but only in the vertical position with the connector at the top; observe that orientation constraint and reseal the inserts when accessories are removed.
